cluster_name: No one connected the dots across time
supporting_refs: Research F PI001/F001; Research B patterns.md; Research A patterns.md; WellBe Principle 5/M11/M12/M22; SHM Health Thread
v2_design_decision: Make Health Thread the central product object, above isolated symptoms, documents, visits, or graph nodes.
caveat: Thread clustering must avoid false pattern creation and must preserve uncertainty.

supporting_refs: Research F PI002/PI007; Research C key_findings.md; SHM F005/F007/F008; WellBe User Narrative Primacy
v2_design_decision: Add Story Memory: verbatim patient words, main fear, own theory, daily impact, correction loop, and concern-by-concern closure.
caveat: Patient narrative must be separated from clinical assessment; do not turn patient theories into diagnoses.

supporting_refs: Research F PI006; Research B normal-test trap; Research C patterns.md; Research A safety notes; WellBe M14/M16
v2_design_decision: Every normal result linked to an active thread must ask: what does this test cover, what remains unexplained, and what follow-up plan exists if symptoms persist?
caveat: Requires careful wording to avoid panic and overtesting.

cluster_name: Pending results and referrals need closure, not just visibility
supporting_refs: Research F PI004/PI005/PI016; Research D patterns.md; Research E high_confidence_findings.md; SHM F006/F010/F011
v2_design_decision: Build a personal Responsibility Memory: user-visible pending items, expected date, owner/contact, next action, evidence source, and escalation suggestion.
caveat: Personal app cannot assign legal clinical ownership unless integrated with a care team; label ownership as recorded/claimed/unknown.

cluster_name: Clinician overload makes more alerts risky
supporting_refs: Research F PI024/safety_risks; Research D E001/Q003; SHM R002/R003/F012; WellBe Safety Engine
v2_design_decision: Favor user-controlled concise packets and thresholded, explainable thread flags over generic clinician alerts.
caveat: Clinician-facing modes require local workflow testing before deployment.

cluster_name: Global workflows differ too much for one universal pathway
supporting_refs: Research F region_adaptations; Research E key_findings.md; Research A low-resource evidence; WellBe VISION user-control guardrail
v2_design_decision: Make care-flow model a configuration of the user’s Health Thread, not a hardcoded global workflow.
caveat: Region templates must not imply local clinical protocols without validation.

cluster_name: Shared Health Memory is a better product identity than data factory alone
supporting_refs: Shared Health Memory framework; SHM F002-F017; WellBe Data Factory principles; Research F product principles
v2_design_decision: Keep Data Factory as the foundation, but position WellBe v2 as a Personal Health Memory OS for unresolved Health Threads.
caveat: Avoid saying the product is a clinician brain replacement or autonomous diagnostic engine.

cluster_name: Privacy and user control are not secondary
supporting_refs: VISION.md; WellBe M02; WellBe non-negotiables; Shared Health Memory safety risks; Research F safety notes
v2_design_decision: All sharing, clinician packets, cross-patient comparison, and institutional integrations must be user-initiated, scoped, revocable, and source-limited.
caveat: Legal roles and data-controller boundaries still need jurisdiction-specific review.
